title: tropilis carunculosa
intro: Tropilis carunculosa, also known as the "Carunculosa Plant", is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tropilis carunculosa include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting skin healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tropilis carunculosa typically include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
